holdings.infoBox: QQQI is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.03%, Apple at 6.93%, Micron Technology at 4.92%, Microsoft at 4.69%, and Amazon.com at 4.17%.

overview.description: The NEOS Nasdaq 100 High Income ETF (QQQI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks high monthly income through NASDAQ-100 stocks and call options, pursuing potential equity growth in a tax-efficient manner. QQQI was launched on Jan 30, 2024 and is issued by Neos.
